title: Reusable Chemicals Respirator, Paint Respirator with Filter Box, 8Pcs Filter Cottons and Goggle, Widely Used in Paint, Dust, Chemical, Epoxy Paint, Woodworking, Organic Vapor Gas, Machine Polishing
features: [ Food-Grade Silicone Material ] - The reusable respirator is made of food-grade silicone material, which fits the face perfectly and is tightly sealed.

[ Double Protection ] - LAMANICE professional half face respirator adopts a dual filtration system, comprehensive anti-fog splash to prevent the intrusion of any tiny substances, to effectively block 97% of organic vapors/gases, fumes, pollen, dust and other particles in the air.
[ Fully Adjustable Comfort Strap ] - The strap belt of the Chemical respirator is adjustable and durable headband quickly adjusts size to fit your head.

[ You will Receive ] - The anti-dust face respirator includes 1x half respirator 7502, 2 x filter box, 2 x filter box cover，8 x replaceable filter cottons，1x Goggle.If you have any questions, please contact us directly. We will provide strong after-sales support.

[ Anti fog goggles ] - The soft face frame and nose pad and wider adjustable headband make you comfortable to wear. Effectively prevent impact hazards, blood splashes, and aerosols. Double sided anti fog lenses,Durable to wear.

[ Wide Application ] - Our half facepiece can effectively block organic vapor/gas, oily smoke, pollen, dust and other particles in the air. it is suitable for outdoor work, soldering, railway, fabrication, workshop, eye protection DIY, lab, cleaning, construction, desert, designer, electricians, infield work, engineers, laser, machining etc.
description: Product Description Reusable Chemicals Respirator, Paint Respirator with Filter Box, 8Pcs Filter Cottons and Goggle. Reusable Chemicals Respirator: Our half facepiece can effectively block organic vapor/gas, oily smoke, pollen, dust and other particles in the air. it is suitable for outdoor work, soldering, railway, fabrication, workshop, eye protection DIY, lab, cleaning, construction, desert, electricians, infield work, engineers, laser, machining etc. How often should the respirator 7502 be replaced? The respirator 7502 does not need to be replaced frequently. When the respirator is dirty, you can clean it with warm water of about 30°. When to Change the Filter Box and Filter Cotton? When you feel that the breathing resistance is obviously too large, the human body feels uncomfortable, or the filter dust is dirty or damaged, the filter cotton needs to be replaced. The filter cotton is usually replaced in about 8 hours (you can extend or shorten the service life according to your environment) Package Included: 1 x Respirator 7502 2 x Filter Box 2 x Filter Box Cover 8 x Filter Cotton 1 x Goggle LAMANICE professional half face respirator adopts a dual filtration system, comprehensive anti-fog splash to prevent the intrusion of any tiny substances.Double sided anti fog lenses,Durable to wear.
